ksa_text: Develop and enforce enterprise data management standards, requirements, and specifications across all data systems and operations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.

nice.top_element_label: Develop data standards, policies, and procedures

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Perform configuration management, problem management, capacity management, and financial management for databases and data management systems.
Develop data standards, policies, and procedures
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-T-004 (DG, Task) maps to Clinical Data Manager scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4556 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: ddat=0.456, eu_ai_act=0.417, dcwf=0.400. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within clinical data management, regulatory compliance, and healthcare analytics.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4556 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DG-T-004 (DG, composite 0.4556) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DAMA DMBOK governance competencies; governance awareness at practitioner level appears in O*NET 15-2051 expanded skill sets does not surface this DG-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4556 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for DG domain content at composite 0.4556 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4556, domain DG. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
